title: メジロパーマーのトレーナー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer hones her running with an unceasing smile, right up to
the middle of this year's summer training camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nothing seems to be getting in the way of the good times. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, Trainer! You should take a little break. Aren't you thirsty?
Don't worry about me and go on ahead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wait, your face is mad red! Let's get you under the shade, right away!
Oh yeah, didn't we bring a damp towel today?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's long gone before I can get a chance to tell her to relax. I
wonder just what's going on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she's always been a kind and caring person, something feels a
little different about all this. She's usually more easygoing in the way
she helps.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wait, don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I see. A complaint, huh? But if she needed to say something
during our training session...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then it must've been about me and my runnin', huh. Makes sense! I
can't say I don't get where she's coming from.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is she caught up on that complaint I got from that one trainer? If
that's the case, I need to intervene.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I slipped up by giving that issue more spotlight than it deserved. I
need her to be more relaxed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm aware of a festival happening tonight near the camp grounds, so I
decide to invite Palmer out for a night of fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sheeesh, this place is hoppin'! There're stalls for days out here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey Trainer, you lookin' to stuff your face? Or do you wanna goof off
with some games? I'm down for anythi—
choice_data_list: What do you want to do, Palmer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh, me? Well uh... I was kinda thinkin' that I'd follow you—
choice_data_list: I want to do whatever you want to.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Eh? But I uhh... Wha? I didn't really have anything in mind, so uhh...
choice_data_list: Oh? We can leave if it's too much of a pain...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
A pain? Heck no! It's not a pain at all, for real. So howsabout uh... The
shooting range, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Got your eyes on a prize, Trainer? Leave it to me and my
sharpshootin'!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sorry... Got nothing. Zilch. Like how did I even manage to get the shots to go in the entirely opposite direction? Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
O-one shot? Yikes, you're way too good at this! What the actual
heck?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, word? Then I'll take that decoration thingy up at the top... Nah, hold up. Aim for something you want!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: This cookie cutting game is tough ! Is this a skill issue? I wanted to get something nice for ya...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
How's it going over there? Better than me, I hope. Oh, just a little
more! Carefully... carefully...
choice_data_list: I'll let you handle the rest!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Say wha?! But this is like, the most important part! But okay, sure. I'll
give it a shot since you asked!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ah, it snapped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, Trainer, that face you made just now... Haha, yikes!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But don't worry about it! We'll win the night yet! Look, there's a water
balloon yo-yo game over there! Let's give it a whirl!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Phew, that was a blast! We played our hearts out and stuffed our faces. Feelin' good, feelin' good!
choice_data_list: If you had a good time, then I'm happy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So you really were lookin' out for me... Sorry, I guess you noticed I've
had kind of a weird vibe lately, huh?
choice_data_list: Did that issue with the other trainer bother you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh yeah, something like that did happen, right? Nah, that didn't
really bother me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's just that you're always going out of your way to help me, no matter
what it is. And like, I know that's a trainer's job and stuff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd do something nice for you in return, but maybe I went a
little too hard. Ahaha, well I screwed up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Looks like despite my best efforts, I just went and made it feel all
weird. Sorry, I'm pretty embarrassed.
choice_data_list: Don't worry about it one bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But you must've felt overloaded as heck...
choice_data_list: I do what I do for you, and it's plenty fun.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh, wha? H-hey, hold up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer's still so serious about the job... So sincere towards
supporting me...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Ever since scouting someone, it's been like this.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Scouting someone...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Scouting... me...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm glad I got to be your trainer, Palmer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (So Trainer's not only content with being a trainer...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (But is especially happy to be my trainer?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (Trainer's saying that as my trainer... helping and supporting me is fun?! That's it, right?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Waaa! Ahhh!
choice_data_list:
Palmer?! Do you have a stomachache? Or is it a
fever?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm so fired up. I'm gonna run like heck and win, on god.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Our running is the real deal. I'll show everyone what we're made of,
rack up wins, and uh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'll show you that you made the right call by becoming my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I'm going to work hard so that one day, she'll be able to
tell me how happy she is to have chosen me as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sob. Trainer's so... so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is it the heat? I use my hand to fan the collapsed Mejiro Palmer with
all the energy I can muster.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She glances at me and just giggles, her face a striking ruby-red.
